name: CodeMirror 6
when_to_use: 需要在工件中编辑长代码并获得选区、撤销、搜索、补全框架与虚拟化视口时用它而非手写 textarea/contenteditable,因为原生在文档状态、IME/选区和长文本增量渲染上失败;非做代码执行、完整 IDE、LSP 工作区或项目文件树。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能放一个 textarea 或脆弱 contenteditable,做不到事务化文档状态、多光标、可靠 IME、搜索面板和长文档视口虚拟化;CodeMirror 以 EditorState/EditorView 扩展模型闭环。

data_in.note: doc 精确传给 EditorView 的初始文档;根 codemirror 包只提供 basicSetup 与核心视图,具体语言解析器不是字符串配置,须以 peer extension 追加。

selection?._default: 省略时光标位于文档开头

spec.note: CodeMirror 默认随内容增高;boot 用 EditorView.theme 把根编辑器固定为 360px并让 .cm-scroller 内滚动,AI 可换其他像素值但禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: 编辑器状态含文档、只读性、换行与选区四个容易混进 DOM props 的维度,minimal 钉死 EditorView 原生配置映射。

peer.note: 语法高亮须额外追加对应 @codemirror/lang-* extension;lint/自定义补全同理追加 @codemirror/lint 或 @codemirror/autocomplete 扩展,根 codemirror 包不会从 language 字符串自动加载。

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;消费 AI 可把 view.state.doc.toString() 下载为文本文件或复制。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行在明确的确认控件中读取 view.state.doc.toString(),再拼 sendPrompt 文案;本条不绑定统一事件出口。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行读取 view.state.doc.toString() 并调用 sendFollowUpMessage;本条不绑定统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: supported:EditorView 原生接受 ShadowRoot,style-mod 把样式挂到该 root;holder、搜索面板与编辑 DOM 不逃逸
carriers.codex: supported:单 ESM 根包会带入 basicSetup 依赖;具体语言包按需另引

isolation.evidence: codemirror@6.0.2 +esm exports 'j as EditorView,v as basicSetup,A as minimalSetup' — import{basicSetup,EditorView} correct (named). @codemirror/view d.ts: EditorViewConfig extends EditorStateConfig (so doc/selection/extensions inherited) + parent?:Element (L702) + root?:Document|ShadowRoot (L710); statics EditorView.editable:Facet (L1284), EditorView.theme(spec) (L1403), EditorView.lineWrapping:Extension (L1445) all real — every boot symbol checks out. selection {anchor,head} matches EditorSelection config. Isolation: style-mod mounts styles to view.root; widget boot passes root:shadowRoot so styles land in shadowRoot.adoptedStyleSheets not document.head (style-mod mount() L94/L129-130; view uses style-mod ^4.1.0). basicSetup autocomplete tooltips default into the editor DOM subtree (no body portal unless tooltips({parent}) configured). destroy() (view d.ts L1124) unregisters managed doc/window listeners.

en.when_to_use: Use it when an artifact must edit long code with selections, undo, search, a completion framework, and a virtualized viewport instead of a handwritten textarea/contenteditable, which fails at document state, IME/selections, and incremental rendering of long text. Not for code execution, a complete IDE, an LSP workspace, or a project file tree.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only add a textarea or fragile contenteditable and cannot provide transactional document state, multiple cursors, reliable IME, a search panel, and viewport virtualization for long documents; CodeMirror closes the loop with the EditorState/EditorView extension model.

data_in.note: doc is passed exactly as the initial EditorView document. The root codemirror package provides only basicSetup and the core view; a specific language parser is not configured by a string and must be added as a peer extension.

selection?._default: Cursor starts at the beginning of the document when omitted

spec.note: CodeMirror normally grows with its content; boot uses EditorView.theme to fix the root editor at 360px and scroll inside .cm-scroller. AI may use another pixel value, but vh and percentage heights are forbidden (rule 3).
